product.name: ArPower Knit
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra elastic medical fabrics for orthopedical,corset and face mask applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Ultra Elastic Antibacterial Water Repellent Knit Fabric
product.specLine: 400 g/m², 45% Polyester 35% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Elastic Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArPower Knit is 40% Polyester 30% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, 400 g/m² ultra elastic knit fabric for corset applications.
It is antibacterial and resistant up to 20 wash.
ArPower Knit is water and oil repellent, can be used during orthopedical treatments.
2 layer of this fabric can be easily used to produce certified EN 14683 face masks.
Ultra Elastic Antibacterial Water Repellent Knit Fabric
400 g/m², 45% Polyester 35% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Elastic Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 40% Polyester (PES) 30% Viscose (CV) 22% Polyamide (PU) 8% Elastane (EL) | EN ISO 2076
Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
